Prepared Exclusively for Rooted Grounds Coffee

Owner Strategy Session — March 2026

Your Brand Has a Story Worth Telling.

A strategy-first look at how Scroll Media will turn Rooted Grounds’ community roots, craft story, and product depth into a D2C growth engine on social media.

Presented By Chase Gianattasio
Agency Scroll Media
Prepared For David & Patsy
Date March 5, 2026
Scroll
The Opportunity

You’ve built a strong B2B business.
Now it’s time to build D2C.

Rooted Grounds has already done something most brands never achieve — you’ve built a proven, respected B2B operation supplying hospitals, resorts, universities, and 50+ businesses across Ohio. That foundation is real. That credibility is earned. Now the opportunity is to take that same brand strength and channel it directly to the consumer through a focused, strategic social media presence that drives D2C growth, subscription revenue, and long-term brand equity.

B2B → D2C
The Strategic Pivot
You’ve proven the product works at scale — hospitals, resorts, and institutions trust it. Now we use social media as the primary tool to bring that same quality directly to the consumer and build a thriving D2C channel alongside your B2B business.
🏆
Proven B2B Credibility
Supplying OSU Wexner Medical Center, resort properties, and 50+ Ohio businesses isn’t a footnote — it’s your most powerful D2C conversion asset. When consumers see who trusts your coffee, the purchase decision becomes easy. We’ll use this credibility as the backbone of your D2C content strategy.
🏭
World-Class Content Assets
A 25,000 sq ft roasting facility, a women-owned founder story, and a 25-year track record of quality — this is premium content that most brands pay to manufacture. You already have it. We’ll put it in front of the right audience, consistently, with a clear strategy behind every post.
📦
D2C Infrastructure Is Ready
Your Shopify store is live. Your subscription model is built. Your products are ready to ship. The only missing piece is a consistent social presence that drives awareness, builds trust, and converts viewers into recurring D2C customers. That’s exactly what we build.
🔍
Social SEO Is Untapped
Instagram is now a search engine. When someone in Cincinnati or Columbus searches “specialty coffee subscription Ohio” or “fresh roasted coffee delivery,” Rooted Grounds should appear at the top. We build your Social SEO footprint from day one so you capture high-intent buyers organically.
🚀
The Timing Is Right
You’re at the exact inflection point where social investment pays the highest long-term return. You have the brand equity, the product quality, and the story. The brands that invest in social now will be the established D2C authorities in 12–24 months. The window to get ahead is open — but not forever.
Who We Are

Built at the crossroads of
simplicity and data.

Scroll Media exists at the intersection of two things most agencies get wrong separately: simplifying social media so it’s actually executable, and grounding every decision in data so it actually performs. We become a true extension of your brand — not a vendor you manage, but a strategic partner you rely on.

01 — We Start by Listening
Deep Brand Immersion
Before we write a single caption or build a single strategy, we send you a detailed onboarding form that covers your brand story, business goals, audience, competitors, tone of voice, and content assets. We don’t guess — we learn. Then we audit your current social profiles and use our strategic framework to shape a clear, simple strategy that is effective and produces real results.
02 — We Build Around Your Audience
Ideal Viewer Profile(s)
Every strategy we build is anchored to a specific Ideal Viewer Profile — a detailed portrait of the exact person your content is designed to reach. We develop no more than two IVPs per account, mapping their motivators, obstacles, and dream outcomes directly to your content strategy. We study aspirational competitors to pull inspiration and benchmark what works in your space.
03 — We Map to Your Goals
Strategy Aligned to Business Outcomes
Every content pillar, every post format, every CTA is mapped back to your specific business goals — in Rooted Grounds’ case, that means D2C growth, subscription revenue, and brand authority. We focus on walking your viewer through a clear purchasing journey from first discovery to checkout, with clear CTAs that drive actual business results at every stage.
04 — We Apply Human Psychology
Psychology-Driven Content
We emphasize the importance of basic human psychology within our social media marketing approach. Trust, social proof, authority, scarcity, and identity — these are the levers that move people from passive viewers to active buyers. Every content decision we make is grounded in how people actually think and behave, not just what looks good or follows a trend.
05 — We Evolve Monthly
Data-Driven Monthly Iteration
We share monthly performance reports to track progress against your goals. Then we make strategic adjustments every month based on what the data tells us — doubling down on what works, cutting what doesn’t, and always pushing the strategy forward. We’re never static. The strategy evolves as your audience grows.
06 — We Take It Off Your Plate
Done-For-You. Fully.
Strategy, content creation, copywriting, scheduling, reporting — all handled. We take the responsibility off your shoulders and minimize friction to provide a done-for-you service that you can rely on and not worry about. Your job is to approve content and run your business. Our job is everything else. You focus on roasting great coffee. We’ll handle the rest.
The Framework

The Social Trust Funnel —
how we move people to buy.

Every piece of content we create for Rooted Grounds is mapped to a specific stage in the buyer journey. We don’t just post — we build a system that moves your audience from discovery to purchase intent to loyal D2C customer.

Top of Funnel
Awareness & Reach
Reels, behind-the-scenes, trending audio — content designed to reach people who’ve never heard of Rooted Grounds. Cast wide, attract the right audience.
~60%
Middle of Funnel
Trust & Education
Carousels, founder stories, process content, community posts — content that builds credibility and makes people want to follow along and learn more.
~30%
Bottom of Funnel
Conversion & Purchase
Product showcases, subscription CTAs, limited offers, testimonials — content that drives people to your Shopify store and converts them into D2C customers.
~10%
Where You Are & Where You’re Going

Instagram Maturity Stages —
your growth journey.

Every brand we work with starts at a defined stage in their social media growth journey. Rooted Grounds is currently in the SPARK stage — the highest-leverage moment to invest in social. This is where the biggest gains happen fastest, and where we’ll build the foundation for everything that follows.

S
SPARK
0 – 2,500 followers
Foundation building, brand voice, content infrastructure, and format testing. The highest-leverage stage — biggest gains happen fastest here. Rooted Grounds is here today.
Focus: Discovery — “What content works for our audience?”
L
LIFT
2,500 – 10,000 followers
Scaling proven formats, building conversion paths, and growing a qualified audience. Consistent cadence established. D2C traffic from social begins to compound.
Focus: Momentum — “How do we scale our wins?”
R
RISE
10,000 – 50,000 followers
Brand authority at scale. Optimization for conversion. Social becomes a measurable, primary D2C acquisition channel. Subscription and product revenue directly attributable to content.
Focus: Optimization — “How do we convert at scale?”
T
THRIVE
50,000+ followers
Brand equity and ecosystem building. Social is a primary driver of revenue, community, and long-term brand value. Compounding authority that competitors cannot easily replicate.
Focus: Authority — “How do we maximize brand equity?”
→
With a consistent 3-posts/week strategy, brands in the SPARK stage typically reach LIFT within 90 days and RISE within 12–18 months. The content infrastructure we build in Month 1 is what makes that trajectory possible.
Social SEO

Instagram is a search engine.
We make sure you show up.

One of the most underutilized growth levers in social media is Social SEO — optimizing your content so it appears when your ideal customer is actively searching. Most agencies ignore this entirely. We build it into every post from day one using our TAM Ladder framework.

70%
of Instagram users use the platform to discover new products and brands — making it a purchase-intent search engine, not just a social platform.
40%
of Gen Z uses TikTok and Instagram as their primary search engine over Google. Your next customer is searching on social right now.
3×
more reach for posts optimized with strategic keywords, hashtags, and captions vs. unoptimized content — without spending a dollar on ads.
The TAM Ladder — How We Build Social SEO for Rooted Grounds
We don’t just throw keywords at a post. We use a 4-level TAM Ladder to target your audience at every stage of awareness — from broad discovery all the way to purchase-ready buyers. Each level serves a different intent, and together they build a compounding SEO presence that grows over time.
Level 1
Broad Industry
Widest reach — attracts anyone interested in coffee
specialty coffee coffee roaster fresh roasted coffee artisan coffee small batch coffee coffee subscription
↓
Level 2
Niche Specific
Qualified audience — coffee buyers with specific intent
Ohio coffee roaster women-owned coffee brand D2C coffee delivery coffee subscription gift buy coffee online Ohio single origin coffee
↓
Level 3
Brand-Specific
High-intent audience — people looking for Rooted Grounds specifically
Rooted Grounds Coffee RG Coffee Mason Ohio Rooted Grounds subscription rgcoffee.com Rooted Grounds roast Rooted Grounds gift
↓
Level 4
Hyper-Local / Purchase Intent
Highest conversion — local buyers ready to purchase now
coffee Mason Ohio coffee near me Cincinnati specialty coffee Cincinnati local coffee roaster Ohio coffee gift Cincinnati coffee subscription Mason OH
This is a preview. Your full keyword bank is developed during Month 1 onboarding based on competitor analysis, search volume data, and audience research.
Content Strategy

Four pillars.
One cohesive brand story.

Every piece of content we create for Rooted Grounds falls into one of four strategic pillars. Together, they build a complete brand narrative that attracts, educates, and converts your ideal D2C customer.

☕
Craft & Quality
The roasting process, bean sourcing, and product quality that sets Rooted Grounds apart. This is the content that earns trust and positions you as the premium choice.
  • Behind-the-scenes roasting process reels
  • Single origin bean sourcing stories
  • Roast profile breakdowns and tasting notes
  • Quality control and freshness guarantee content
🌱
Roots & Community
The women-owned founder story, Mason OH community ties, B2B partnerships, and cause-driven mission. This is the content that builds emotional connection and loyalty.
  • Founder story — David & Patsy’s journey
  • B2B partner spotlights (hospitals, resorts, OSU)
  • Community events and local partnerships
  • Women-owned business milestone content
📚
Education & Discovery
Coffee knowledge, brewing guides, and industry insights that position Rooted Grounds as the authority. This is the content that earns saves, shares, and follows.
  • How to brew the perfect cup at home
  • Light vs. dark roast — what’s the difference?
  • Coffee subscription guide — what to expect
  • Why fresh-roasted coffee tastes different
🛒
Shop & Subscribe
Product showcases, subscription CTAs, and D2C conversion content. This is the content that drives people from your Instagram to your Shopify store and converts them into recurring revenue.
  • Subscription unboxing and first-bag experience
  • Gift subscription content for holidays and occasions
  • Product launch announcements and limited releases
  • Customer testimonials and UGC reposts
12 Content Ideas Built for Rooted Grounds

Organized by funnel stage — every idea has a purpose and a place in the buyer’s journey.

TOFU Top of Funnel — Awareness & Discovery — Goal: Reach new audiences, build reach, attract the right people
Reel TOFU — Awareness
“We roast 25,000 sq ft of coffee and you’ve probably never heard of us.”
Warehouse tour reel. Massive reach potential — the contrast hook drives curiosity and shares. Targets non-followers who have never heard of Rooted Grounds.
Reel TOFU — Awareness
“What happens between the farm and your cup.”
Bean-to-bag process reel. Educational + visual = high organic reach and saves. Pulls in coffee-curious audiences who don’t know the brand yet.
Reel TOFU — Awareness
“POV: You work at a hospital and the coffee is actually incredible.”
B2B partnership content from the consumer angle. Unexpected hook drives curiosity and reach. Turns institutional credibility into viral discovery content.
Reel TOFU — Awareness
“We supply 50+ locations across Ohio. Here’s what makes our coffee different.”
Social proof reel using B2B scale to build D2C credibility. Authority positioning content that reaches new audiences through the scale hook.
MOFU Middle of Funnel — Trust & Education — Goal: Convert followers into believers, build credibility, drive saves and profile visits
Carousel MOFU — Trust
“How we went from a garage to supplying OSU Wexner Medical Center.”
Founder origin story carousel. High save rate — exactly the content that builds D2C brand loyalty. People buy from people they trust.
Carousel MOFU — Education
“5 reasons your grocery store coffee tastes stale (and what to do about it).”
Educational carousel that creates urgency for fresh-roasted D2C subscription. High save rate. Positions Rooted Grounds as the solution to a problem the viewer already has.
Static MOFU — Community
“Meet the women behind Rooted Grounds.”
Founder portrait + story post. Women-owned angle drives engagement and brand affinity. Builds the emotional connection that converts followers into loyal buyers.
Carousel MOFU — Education
“Light, medium, or dark roast? Here’s how to pick the right one for you.”
Decision-making carousel. Drives saves and positions Rooted Grounds as the trusted guide. Moves viewers from interest to purchase-readiness.
Carousel MOFU — Community
“A day in the life at Rooted Grounds.”
Behind-the-scenes day carousel. Humanizes the brand and builds the community connection that drives D2C loyalty. High comment and save rate.
BOFU Bottom of Funnel — Conversion & Subscription — Goal: Drive Shopify traffic, subscription sign-ups, and D2C purchases
Reel BOFU — Conversion
“Our coffee subscription — what you get, how it works, why it’s different.”
Subscription explainer reel with direct CTA to Shopify. The highest-converting D2C format for subscription products. Drives link taps and sign-ups.
Reel BOFU — Conversion
“The best gift for a coffee lover (that they actually want).”
Gift subscription reel. Seasonal evergreen content that drives D2C gifting revenue year-round. Targets high-intent buyers who are actively looking to purchase.
Static BOFU — Conversion
“Fresh roasted. Shipped to your door. Starting at $X.”
Clean product post with direct Shopify CTA. Simple, direct, conversion-focused. Run as organic and paid. The clearest possible path from Instagram to checkout.
Brand Inspiration

Content mapped to your goals.
Every post has a purpose.

Every piece of content we create for Rooted Grounds is mapped to a specific stage of your buyer’s journey — from first discovery all the way to subscription checkout. These are real examples from brands in your space that prove the strategy works. This is exactly how we’ll build your content engine.

TOFU
Top of Funnel — Awareness & Discovery
Goal: Get in front of people who have never heard of Rooted Grounds. Cast wide, attract the right audience, build reach.
Onyx Coffee Lab
@onyxcoffeelab • 275K followers
Why this is TOFU — and why it works for Rooted Grounds
Roastery tour Reel. This is a pure discovery play — it reaches people who have never heard of the brand but are interested in coffee. Rooted Grounds’ 25,000 sq ft facility is a massive content advantage most brands can only dream of. We’ll use it to dominate this format.
Roastery tours are the highest-reach format in specialty coffee
Process content attracts new audiences — 60%+ non-follower reach
Builds instant credibility before they even follow you
View on Instagram ↗
Sisters Coffee Co.
@sisterscoffee • 16K followers
Why this is TOFU — and why it works for Rooted Grounds
Behind-the-scenes roastery content with a strong intentionality message. This is the content voice Rooted Grounds should own — premium, craft-focused, and founder-driven. Notice how it reaches people who don’t follow the account yet and pulls them in with authenticity.
Authenticity-first content outperforms polished ads in reach
Strong hooks in the first 2 seconds drive watch time and algorithm push
Women-owned + craft story is a powerful differentiator for D2C
View on Instagram ↗
MOFU
Middle of Funnel — Trust & Education
Goal: Convert followers into believers. Build credibility, tell the brand story, and make people want to buy from you specifically — not just any coffee brand.
Counter Culture Coffee
@counterculturecoffee • 159K followers
Why this is MOFU — and why it works for Rooted Grounds
“The People Behind the Coffee” — a meet-the-roaster series. This is the format that builds the deepest audience trust for D2C brands. People don’t buy from companies — they buy from people. David and Patsy’s story is the most powerful asset Rooted Grounds has. We’ll build a series around it.
Founder stories are the highest-converting MOFU format
Team spotlights humanize the brand and drive follows + saves
Educational craft content positions you as the premium choice
View on Instagram ↗
Counter Culture Coffee
@counterculturecoffee • 159K followers
Why this is MOFU — and why it works for Rooted Grounds
Employee roaster spotlight: “I’m proud to be on the roasting team because of the quality of the product.” This is the quality-proof content that moves people from interested to convinced. It answers the unspoken question every D2C buyer has: “Can I trust this brand?” Rooted Grounds’ team and B2B client roster (hospitals, resorts) is proof that answers that question definitively.
Quality-focused messaging attracts premium D2C buyers who pay full price
B2B social proof (hospital + resort accounts) is powerful D2C credibility
Consistent series content builds a loyal audience that buys repeatedly
View on Instagram ↗
BOFU
Bottom of Funnel — Conversion & Subscription
Goal: Drive people to your Shopify store and convert them into D2C customers — especially recurring subscription buyers. This is where social becomes measurable revenue.
→
A note on BOFU content: The best BOFU content doesn’t feel like an ad — it feels like a natural next step for someone who already trusts you. We’ll build product showcase Reels, subscription unboxing content, limited-time offer posts, and gift-focused content that drives people directly to your Shopify store. The examples below show the format and tone we’ll use for Rooted Grounds.
☕
Product Showcase Reel
A 15–30 second Reel showcasing your best-selling roast with a clear CTA: “Link in bio to order.” Filmed in the roastery with your bags front and center. This is the format that drives the most direct Shopify traffic from Instagram.
→ Drives: Direct Shopify link taps, product page visits
📦
Subscription Unboxing Content
A carousel or Reel showing the full subscription experience — from roasting to packaging to doorstep delivery. “Fresh-roasted coffee, delivered to your door. Start your subscription at the link in bio.” This is the highest-converting D2C format for subscription products.
→ Drives: Subscription sign-ups, recurring D2C revenue
🎁
Gift & Occasion Content
Seasonal and occasion-based content targeting gift buyers: “The coffee lover in your life deserves better than a gift card. Give them Rooted Grounds.” Targets high-intent buyers who are actively looking to purchase — the highest-value D2C segment.
→ Drives: Gift purchases, new D2C customer acquisition
🏭
B2B Social Proof → D2C Trust
“We roast for hospitals, resorts, and 50+ businesses across Ohio. Now you can get the same coffee delivered to your door.” Your B2B credibility is a massive D2C conversion lever. We’ll use it to build trust and drive subscription sign-ups.
→ Drives: D2C trust, subscription conversions, premium positioning

Ideal Viewer Profile

Before we write a single caption,
we build this.

The Ideal Viewer Profile (IVP) is the strategic foundation of everything we create. It’s a detailed portrait of the exact person your content is designed to reach — their motivators, obstacles, dream outcomes, and the content that moves them to buy. Most agencies skip this step. We consider it non-negotiable. Here’s a preview of what we’ll build for Rooted Grounds.

☕
The Craft Coffee Loyalist
Primary IVP • Rooted Grounds Coffee • D2C Subscription Focus
Preview
Who They Are
35–55 year old professional, homeowner, household income $75K+. Lives in or near Mason, Cincinnati, or greater Ohio. Takes their morning coffee seriously — it’s a ritual, not just caffeine. Currently buying from a national brand (Starbucks, Peet’s) but feels like they’re settling.
Core Motivators
  • Wants to support local, independent businesses over corporate chains
  • Values quality and craft — willing to pay premium for the real thing
  • Wants to feel connected to where their coffee comes from
  • Loves the idea of a subscription that “just works” — fresh coffee, no effort
Key Obstacles
  • Doesn’t know Rooted Grounds exists yet — zero social SEO footprint
  • Skeptical of online coffee subscriptions — “will it actually be fresh?”
  • Doesn’t understand the difference between commodity and specialty roasting
  • Hasn’t been given a compelling reason to switch from their current brand
Dream Outcome
A consistent supply of exceptional, locally-roasted coffee delivered to their door — from a brand they feel proud to support and tell their friends about. They become a brand advocate, not just a customer.
How This Maps to Our Strategy
TOFU
Roastery tour Reels and behind-the-scenes content reach them on Instagram before they’ve heard of Rooted Grounds. The 25,000 sq ft facility is the hook.
MOFU
David & Patsy’s founder story, the B2B client roster (hospitals, resorts), and craft education content answers their skepticism and builds trust.
BOFU
Subscription showcase content, unboxing Reels, and gift-occasion posts with a direct Shopify CTA convert them from follower to paying subscriber.
📄
This is a preview. Your full IVP — including secondary avatars, complete keyword mapping, content format recommendations per avatar, and objection-handling content strategy — is delivered as part of your Month 1 Strategy deliverable.

90-Day Plan

What the first 90 days
look like.

A clear, phased approach to building Rooted Grounds’ social presence from the ground up — with measurable milestones at every stage. The first 90 days are about building the right foundation: strategy, content systems, brand voice, and audience. Meaningful business impact from social media typically develops over 6–12 months of consistent execution, with compounding results over 2–3 years.

Week 1–2
Strategy & Onboarding
Week 3–4
Strategy Delivered & Approved
Week 4–5
First Content Shoot
Week 5
First Posts Go Live
Month 2
Audience Growth & First D2C Signals
Month 3
Foundation Complete — Long-Term Growth Begins
Month 1 — Foundation
Build the Base
  • 60-minute onboarding strategy call
  • Brand audit & competitor analysis
  • Ideal Viewer Profile (IVP) developed
  • Content pillar strategy (4 pillars mapped to D2C)
  • Custom keyword bank & Social SEO setup
  • Profile optimization (bio, highlights, link-in-bio)
  • First content calendar delivered & approved
  • First content shoot scheduled & executed
  • First posts go live
→ Outcome: Brand voice established, content system live, baseline metrics set
Month 2 — Momentum
Build the Audience
  • Content cadence fully in motion (2–3x/week)
  • Follower growth tracking begins
  • Top-performing content formats identified
  • SEO keywords showing in search results
  • First D2C conversion content deployed
  • Subscription-focused content live
  • Mid-month performance check-in
  • Strategy adjusted based on data
→ Outcome: Content cadence established, follower growth beginning, first D2C link taps appearing
Month 3 — Traction
Build the Foundation for D2C Growth
  • Content compounding — older posts still driving traffic
  • Subscription & product content fully deployed
  • Early D2C traffic signals from social to Shopify
  • 90-day performance report delivered
  • Quarterly strategy review call
  • Month 4+ strategy plan presented
  • LIFT stage trajectory confirmed — 6–12 month growth plan set
→ Outcome: Foundation is complete. Content system is live. The groundwork for long-term D2C growth is in place — the compounding begins now.

Ready to Move Forward?

Here’s exactly what happens
when you say yes.

No guessing, no ambiguity. From the moment you confirm, here is the exact sequence of events — every step, every date, every deliverable. We’ve designed this process to get you from “yes” to live content as fast as possible.

01
Confirm & Sign Contract
You confirm the package and we send over a formal service agreement for digital signature. Takes 5 minutes. This locks in your start date and officially kicks off the engagement.
→ Same day or next business day
↓
02
Complete Onboarding Form
We send you a comprehensive onboarding questionnaire covering your brand story, target audience, product lineup, D2C goals, competitors, tone of voice, and content assets. This is the foundation for everything we build.
→ Completed within 48–72 hours of contract signing
↓
03
Onboarding & Kickoff Call
A 60-minute deep-dive call with Chase and the strategy team. We walk through your onboarding form, ask clarifying questions, align on goals, and set the direction for your strategy. This is where we get to know Rooted Grounds inside and out.
→ Scheduled within Week 1
↓
04
Strategy Presentation
3–4 weeks after kickoff, we present your complete strategy: Ideal Viewer Profile, content pillars, keyword bank, profile optimization plan, and first content calendar. You review, give feedback, and we finalize before execution begins.
→ Presented 3–4 weeks after kickoff call
↓
05
First Content Shoot
We schedule and execute your first on-site content shoot at the Rooted Grounds facility. Our team captures Reels, carousels, and static content based on the approved strategy. Shot list is prepared in advance — you just show up and do what you do.
→ Scheduled immediately after strategy approval
↓
06
First Posts Go Live
Your first pieces of content are published. The content system is live. The audience-building begins. From this point forward, we’re in execution mode — consistent content, monthly reporting, and a clear path toward D2C growth.
→ Approximately 5–6 weeks from contract signing
Let’s build something
worth rooting for.

Rooted Grounds has the brand, the story, and the product. We have the strategy and the system. Together, we’ll build the social presence that turns your D2C ambitions into reality.

Chase Gianattasio — Scroll Media
